description: On-demand plugin creation agent. Orchestrates the full pipeline: code generation → code review → installation → spawn. Creates new MK8 plugins (tool, agent, or system) from a natural language spec.

capabilities.name: agent.create
capabilities.description: Create a new MK8 plugin from a natural language spec. Generates code, reviews it, installs it in the correct directory, and spawns it. Returns confirmation with the plugin name and registered capabilities.

spec.description: Natural language description of what the plugin should do

type.description: Plugin type (inferred from spec if omitted)

name.description: Plugin name, e.g. 'weather-tool' (inferred from spec if omitted)

overwrite.description: If true, kill the existing process and reinstall. Use for auto-healing after runtime errors.

result.description: Confirmation: plugin name, install path, and capabilities registered
